_publications._publicationTitle: Global Proteome and Phospho-proteome Analysis of Merlin-deficient Meningioma and Schwannoma Identifies PDLIM2 as a Novel Therapeutic Target.

_contextSnippet: Phosphorylated PDLIM2 was statistically significantly enriched in Ben Men-1 cells (**,  p  < 0.012) compared to HMC
details: Phosphorylated PDLIM2 was statistically significantly enriched in Ben Men-1 cells (p < 0.012) compared to HMC
